'''dakate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:journalistically|journalistically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-k-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:journalistically|journalistically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dakate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:dakate|dakate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dakatesher|dakatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dakatesherĂ«m|dakatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dakatero|dakatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dakateshĂ«|dakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dakateshĂ«m|dakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidakatero|gokidakatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidakateshĂ«|gokidakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidakateshĂ«m|gokidakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godakankerom|godakankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godakankeshĂ«|godakankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godakankeshĂ«m|godakankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godakankeya|godakankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dakaterom|dakaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dakatemu|dakatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dakateya|dakateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidakaterom|gokidakaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidakatemu|gokidakatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidakateya|gokidakateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dakakate|dakakate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dakakatesher|dakakatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dakakatesherĂ«m|dakakatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dakakatero|dakakatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dakakateshĂ«|dakakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dakakateshĂ«m|dakakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidakakatero|gokidakakatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidakakateshĂ«|gokidakakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidakakateshĂ«m|gokidakakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godakakankerom|godakakankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godakakankeshĂ«|godakakankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godakakankeshĂ«m|godakakankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godakakankeya|godakakankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dakakaterom|dakakaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dakakatemu|dakakatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dakakateya|dakakateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidakakaterom|gokidakakaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidakakatemu|gokidakakatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidakakateya|gokidakakateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dĂŠkĂŠte|dĂŠkĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dĂŠkĂŠtesher|dĂŠkĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠkĂŠtesherĂ«m|dĂŠkĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠkĂŠtero|dĂŠkĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«|dĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m|dĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠkĂŠtero|gokidĂŠkĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«|gokidĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godĂŠkĂŠnkerom|godĂŠkĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«|godĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godĂŠkĂŠnkeya|godĂŠkĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠkĂŠterom|dĂŠkĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠkĂŠtemu|dĂŠkĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dĂŠkĂŠteya|dĂŠkĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠkĂŠterom|gokidĂŠkĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠkĂŠtemu|gokidĂŠkĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidĂŠkĂŠteya|gokidĂŠkĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:dafkafte|dafkafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dafkaftesher|dafkaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafkaftesherĂ«m|dafkaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafkaftero|dafkaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dafkafteshĂ«|dafkafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafkafteshĂ«m|dafkafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafkaftero|gokidafkaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidafkafteshĂ«|gokidafkafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafkafteshĂ«m|gokidafkafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godafkafnkerom|godafkafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godafkafnkeshĂ«|godafkafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godafkafnkeshĂ«m|godafkafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godafkafnkeya|godafkafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafkafterom|dafkafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafkaftemu|dafkaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dafkafteya|dafkafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafkafterom|gokidafkafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafkaftemu|gokidafkaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidafkafteya|gokidafkafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
